horoscope: With today's Moon, you want to feel more in charge of your life, dear Aries. It can be a good time to enjoy the rewards of recent accomplishments and to consider or set new goals. As Pluto begins its yearly retrograde cycle today, some of your long-term goals are up for revision over the coming months. Plans, obligations, and concerns regarding your social life, friendships, or happiness goals may have heavy energy hanging over them this week as this shift occurs. However, as the retrograde advances, things not only even out but also feel less pressured. Giving special attention to your emotions and exercising patience can help you navigate this shift. This retrograde period will continue until October 15th, and it's powerful for taking a step back to examine your fears, resentments, and possible self-destructive tendencies so you're not living on autopilot. It's a strong time for healing. Today, aim to pace yourself.

The Moon spends today and tomorrow in your spirit sector, dear Taurus, and emotional refreshment becomes more important. There may be a chance to pursue a special interest or enjoy a change of scenery. Today favors creative thinking over precision. Also today, Pluto begins its yearly retrograde, and some of your long-term career goals may be up for review in the months ahead. This retrograde cycle lasts until October 15th, and it's excellent for reworking career and planning initiatives, doing the research and legwork, and refining projects. Facing up to truths about the past and a closer look at career, life path, and relationship matters can be part of the picture. While pressures and fears can magnify this week, the retrograde cycle itself helps you detach and observe, giving you a clearer perspective. You're more able to identify areas where you've been over-attached, overthinking, worried, or obsessed.

The Moon spends today and tomorrow in your intimacy sector, dear Gemini, and you tend to turn inward as you examine your motivations or take a break from the action so that you can observe and strategize. Today's energies may also feel somewhat heavy with Pluto stationing and turning retrograde, but this time calls for self-reflection. As Pluto begins its yearly retrograde cycle today, areas such as your studies, work, health, spirit for adventure, or belief systems may require more thought or strategy. This cycle, lasting until October 15th, is an excellent time to step back from a situation, allowing you to gain perspective and identify areas where you've been too attached, controlling, or tense. Use this period to reflect on your personal belief systems or general outlook regarding your future. You may find yourself reassessing, observing, and gaining a new vision of a publishing project, educational path, or your worldview. Today, as the shift occurs, take your time as you digest and process.

The Moon spends today and tomorrow in your opposite sign, dear Cancer, challenging you to find a balance in your life. It's a good time to consider the other side of the coin and weigh the pros and cons. Interactions with someone might help you gain perspective. Also today, Pluto stations as it begins its retrograde cycle, and until October 15th, you benefit from a review or reassessment of debts, dependencies, and intimate relationships. If the give-and-take or trust in a key relationship has fallen out of balance, you'll feel it more intensely now. Because Pluto rules your solar fifth house, romantic relationships or recreation and creativity, especially related to issues of control or fear, can also come into focus with this shift. As the retrograde progresses, you may be detaching just enough to make improvements. For example, this could mean taking a step back to reassess your needs and boundaries in a relationship or finding a new balance in your shared responsibilities. The station occurring now can magnify problem areas, but the retrograde cycle in the months ahead is far more natural and comfortable.

The Moon spends today and tomorrow in your work and health sector, dear Leo. The idea with this transit is to handle minor problems before they manage to grow and take over your life. Your emotional focus is on your daily affairs and wellness. Pluto begins its retrograde cycle today, and it will remain retrograde for many months, until October 15th. With the shift today, things can admittedly feel a bit heavy, and problem areas can magnify. However, the months-long cycle itself has the potential to yield new discoveries and insights. In fact, it can help ease some pressure! The areas most affected by this retrograde cycle are one-on-one relationships, home, and family matters. It can prompt a need to review your feelings, a tendency to cling to old patterns, or an examination of the past instead of braving new territory. Aim to step back from matters to gain a clearer, more objective perspective. This process will help you identify areas where you've pushed too hard or where you've been too attached for your own good!

The Moon spends today and tomorrow in your creative sector, dear Virgo, and you're exploring or discovering your needs for fun and entertainment. Still, with Pluto starting its yearly retrograde cycle today, problem areas can magnify with the shift, likely related to work, routines, communication, and health. As you grow accustomed to this energy, however, you'll be in a brilliant position to review and reassess these matters as you gain perspective. You might more clearly see where you've been overly attached or where you've put too much pressure on yourself in these areas. You take on a more detached, observational role in these life departments until October 15th, and you'll do some work on fears or concerns.

The Moon spends today and tomorrow in your home and family sector, dear Libra, and you seek familiar faces and places. The emphasis is on finding peace, comfort, and a stronger sense of self before moving forward. Also today, Pluto begins its yearly retrograde. With the shift this week, there can be a temporary magnification of problems, complications, and fears related to those areas of your chart strongly influenced by Pluto: romance, creativity, recreation, finances, and security. Pressures will subside going forward, and in fact, you'll get to the point where you're significantly detached enough to gain a better perspective on these things. This way, you can more clearly see where fear and over-attachment may have worked against you. This powerful period for self-knowledge continues until October 15th.

The Moon spends today and tomorrow in your communication sector, dear Scorpio, increasing your curiosity and desire to reach out. You can be comfortably busy. Negotiations can bring very successful outcomes. Also today, your planetary ruler, Pluto, begins its retrograde cycle. This retrograde positions you well to review, reassess, and gain a new perspective about areas of your chart strongly influenced by Pluto: your personal goals, security, comfort, family, and home or domestic life. Some related plans may need adjustment, and you're likely to find it easier to detach from pressures and fears in these areas. However, as the shift occurs today, you may feel these pressures more intensely! It's a matter of acclimatizing to this shift. Keep in mind that you'll find this process more comfortable as you grow more accustomed to this energy. This retrograde will continue until October 15th.

Comfort and pleasure are in high focus today, dear Sagittarius, and may drive decision-making with the Moon in your solar second house. Slowing down is good for you now. You might take the time to think up new ways to protect, improve, or build your resources. Also today, Pluto begins its retrograde cycle, which lasts until mid-October, putting you in a more reflective frame of mind. It's a great period for searching deep within for answers. Looking to the past is a necessary step to help you see what needs to change in your life. It's also a time to take a break from pushing yourself too hard mentally. Some projects may stall or need editing, adjustments, and refinements. The shift happening today can act to magnify fears and problem areas. Still, as you adjust to this shift, you'll find this cycle to be quite valuable for self-understanding. As it occurs in your communications sector, your connections, personal interests, and transportation matters are the focus. If you've been micromanaging and overattending to your personal interests and daily affairs, you'll see how stepping back a little can be helpful.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, dear Capricorn, and you quite naturally take the lead or act independently today. The qualities that come most naturally to you tend to set the emotional tone of the day. At the same time, today's energies are strong for a special understanding with a loved one. Pluto begins its yearly retrograde cycle today, and this change of direction prompts you to review your financial affairs, attitude towards money and things, what and who you value, and self-worth. While fears or worries about money and security can intensify as this shift unfolds, the retrograde cycle itself, lasting until October 15th, helps you gain perspective. With decreased pressure on you to control or micromanage your practical affairs, your choices and decisions improve. Even so, it's important not to push matters that must evolve in their own due time. If you've been micromanaging your resources to the point of great tension, for example, you'll welcome this retrograde period for your ability to pull back and see where you've been over-attached.

The Moon spends all day in your hidden privacy sector, dear Aquarius, and you may want to hide away similarly, at least on an emotional level. It's time to recoup your energy. Activities that honor your need to reconnect with your inner spirit are apt today and tomorrow. Also today, Pluto begins its yearly retrograde cycle, affecting you a little more than others because Pluto is visiting your sign! As the shift occurs today, there can be some magnification of unresolved matters, fears, or compulsions now and this week. However, once you get beyond the shift, the months-long retrograde cycle is excellent for detaching yourself from these things enough to see where you may have been overly worried or obsessing. You're in a fine position to review and reassess your approach to self-starts, new beginnings, personal initiative, career matters, and responsibilities. If you've been over-controlling or micro-managing, you recognize this now and want to take some of the pressure off. Pluto's retrograde lasts until October 15th.

The Moon spends the day in your social sector, dear Pisces, and you seek comfortable, pressure-free interactions. People are drawn to you quite naturally. Also today, Pluto begins its yearly retrograde, and with the shift happening now, you might experience some intensifying fears, worries, or frustrations. Rest assured, these things should settle down shortly. In fact, the retrograde lasts until October 15th, and it encourages you to observe and understand your attachments and fears. You may not have noticed how concerns, guilt, and control issues have worked against you. Now that you're making these associations, it's easier to work on healing and resolving problems. This Pluto retrograde cycle occurs in your privacy sector, presenting a powerful time for review.
